ns1:revision.ns1:text:
'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.5 (3.10.0-862.2.3.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 6.9 (2.6.32-696.28.1.el6) *RHEL 7.5 (3.10.0-862.2.3.el7) *SLES12 SP3 (4.4.126-94.22) *Ubuntu 16.04 (4.4.0-116) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.42.13.wc6 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.9.X == Issues fixed between 2.10.3 and 2.10.4 == ''' New Feature ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10030 LU-10030]: add native lfs tools support for project quota ''' Improvement ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-6051 LU-6051]: "lfs_migrate" improvements *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-6353 LU-6353]: Push Wireshark Support Upstream *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7251 LU-7251]: reduce commit callbacks in OSP *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8649 LU-8649]: Print console message in recovery when waiting for first client *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9796 LU-9796]: Speedup file creation under heavy concurrency *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9946 LU-9946]: Have fileset on default nodemap *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9950 LU-9950]: add support for Ubuntu(debian) arm64 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10516 LU-10516]: Update recommended e2fsprogs version *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10676 LU-10676]: lustre-zfs-dkms rpm should Provide lustre-dkms for easy upgrades *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10864 LU-10864]: update changelog kernel version for ubuntu1604 ''' Bug ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5024 LU-5024]: (mdc_lib.c:163:mdc_pack_name()) ASSERTION( cpy_len == name_len && lu_name_is_valid_2(buf, cpy_len) ) failed: *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5152 LU-5152]: Can't enforce block quota when unprivileged user change group *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5163 LU-5163]: (lu_object.h:852:lu_object_attr()) ASSERTION( ((o)->lo_header->loh_attr & LOHA_EXISTS) != 0 ) failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5490 LU-5490]: sanity test_133d: FAIL: samedir_rename_size error *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-5680 LU-5680]: sanity-hsm uses /etc/motd (which is probably of size 0) *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7001 LU-7001]: osp_sync.c: 1139: osp_sync_thread *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7746 LU-7746]: skip test of new functionality on upstream client *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-7988 LU-7988]: HSM: high lock contention for cdt_llog_lock *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8264 LU-8264]: lfs setstripe without -p pool_name doesn't inherit pool from parent/ROOT directory *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8346 LU-8346]: conf-sanity test_93: test failed to respond and timed out *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8653 LU-8653]: broken inheritance of default striping *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8856 LU-8856]: ZFS-MDT 100% full. Cannot delete files. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8912 LU-8912]: nodemap: error: nodemap_add_range: nodemap ranges must be contiguous *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8913 LU-8913]: nodemap: wildcard '*@<net>' is broken *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-8990 LU-8990]: Failback LBUG lod_device_free()) ASSERTION( atomic_read(&lu->ld_ref) *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9052 LU-9052]: lod_verify_md_striping()) lsh-MDT0000-mdtlov: invalid lmv_user_md: magic = cd20cd0 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9135 LU-9135]: sanity test_313: osp_sync.c:571:osp_sync_interpret()) LBUG *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9145 LU-9145]: When Shared Key feature is active, Nodemap admin property allows more access *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9158 LU-9158]: sanity-quota, test_12b: rebalancing failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9372 LU-9372]: OOM happens on OSS during Lustre recovery for more than 5000 clients *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9411 LU-9411]: sanity test_27D: interop 2.9.0<->master llapi_layout_test 30, 31 failure *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9437 LU-9437]: sanity-lfsck test_33: only 0 of 4 MDTs are in completed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9444 LU-9444]: conf-sanity test_87: Create file with 3 components failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9551 LU-9551]: I/O errors when lustre uses multipath devices *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9664 LU-9664]: sanity-hsm test_9a: @@@@@@ FAIL: mds4 CDT state is not 'disabled' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9735 LU-9735]: Sles12Sp2 and 2.9 getcwd() sometimes fails *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9833 LU-9833]: New gcc compiler generates a lot of format-truncation warnings *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9836 LU-9836]: Issues with 2.10 upgrade and files missing LMAC_FID_ON_OST flag *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9844 LU-9844]: building lustre utils lsnapshot.c fails for arch ppc64le *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9874 LU-9874]: simplify project transfer codes *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9887 LU-9887]: sanity-lfsck test_9a: FAIL: (4) Got speed 952, expected less than 144 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9892 LU-9892]: parallel-scale-nfsv3 no sub tests failed: setup nfs failed! *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9967 LU-9967]: sanity test_60a: Module llog_test is in use *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9972 LU-9972]: Performance regressions on unique directory removal *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9983 LU-9983]: LBUG llog_osd.c:327:llog_osd_declare_write_rec() - all DNE MDS *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9998 LU-9998]: Default partition setup is not optimal for best metadata performance *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10005 LU-10005]: File creation to slave MDT is much slower than primary MDT on DNE1 configuration *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10011 LU-10011]: suppress annoying messages for lfs quota *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10045 LU-10045]: sanity-lfsck no sub tests failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10052 LU-10052]: replay-single test_20b fails with 'after 4096 > before 3072' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10161 LU-10161]: lbuild: Failed to determine the default route interface *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10199 LU-10199]: sanity test_56xb: hard links individually migrated (12 != 11) *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10212 LU-10212]: operation ost_read to node [*] failed: rc = -116 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10214 LU-10214]: Example `lnet_routes.conf` syntax for gateway range is not supported *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10224 LU-10224]: recovery-small test_57: timeout *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10226 LU-10226]: sanity-sec test_27: fileset not cleared on default nodemap *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10237 LU-10237]: "ls" hangs on a particular directory *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10244 LU-10244]: LustreError: 201288:0:(osc_page.c:336:osc_page_delete()) ASSERTION( (!(value != ((void *)0)) || (value == opg)) ) failed: *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10290 LU-10290]: sanity-sec test_27: fileset info still not cleared on nodemap *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10297 LU-10297]: parallel-scale-nfsv4 test_metabench: ASSERTION( nfound <= inuse->op_count ) failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10316 LU-10316]: Interop 2.7.x <->2.10.2 sanity test_77c: FAIL: dump content does not match on OSS *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10321 LU-10321]: MDS - umount hangs during failback *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10327 LU-10327]: sanity-hsm, test_24c: cannot chown '/mnt/lustre/d24c.sanity-hsm/f24c.sanity-hsm' to '500:nobody' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10331 LU-10331]: mds-survey test_1: mds-survey failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10341 LU-10341]: kkuc shoud send HALs only to suitable CTs *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10350 LU-10350]: ost-pools test 1n fails with 'failed to write to /mnt/lustre/d1n.ost-pools/file: 1' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10356 LU-10356]: CLIO simplification broke a direct IO sometimes *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10357 LU-10357]: ll_ioc_copy_{start,end}() depend on search_inode_for_lustre() which is bad *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10364 LU-10364]: add version check to sanity test_255b *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10368 LU-10368]: disk quota OST rebalancing issues *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10392 LU-10392]: LustreError: 82980:0:(fid_handler.c:329:__seq_server_alloc_meta()) srv-lglossy-MDT0002: Allocated super-sequence failed: rc = -115 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10421 LU-10421]: mds-survey test 1: Timeout occurred after 426 mins, last suite running was mds-survey, restarting cluster to continue tests *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10422 LU-10422]: layout LFSCK try to fix consistent owner unexpectedly *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10437 LU-10437]: sanity-pfl test_8: dbench failed *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10444 LU-10444]: l_getidentity keeps remount /sys/kernel/debug and reverting permissions. *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10449 LU-10449]: TBF policy can't be set correctly *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10462 LU-10462]: lfs setstripe --component-add fails to recognize -c -1 as all targets *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10463 LU-10463]: Poor write performance periodically on repeated test runs *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10505 LU-10505]: sanity test_56w: '/usr/bin/lfs getstripe -c /mnt/lustre/d56w.sanityw/file1 wrong: found 7, expected 6 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10531 LU-10531]: GSS, Shared Key and Kerberos support broken in master and lustre 2.10 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10541 LU-10541]: parallel-scale-nfsv3 test racer_on_nfs hangs with BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10560 LU-10560]: Fixes for 4.14 kernel *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10563 LU-10563]: kernel update [RHEL7.4 3.10.0-693.17.1.el7] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10564 LU-10564]: kernel update [RHEL6.9 2.6.32-696.20.1.el6] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10565 LU-10565]: Handle some small features in upstream *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10566 LU-10566]: parallel-scale-nfsv4 test_metabench: mkdir: cannot create directory on Read-only file system *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10575 LU-10575]: No mdsrate on Ubuntu client *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10598 LU-10598]: Ignore IGIF formatted last_id *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10603 LU-10603]: ptlrpc_lprocfs_req_buffers_max_fops unused *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10634 LU-10634]: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.114-94.11] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10650 LU-10650]: cslco1705 crash: dt_statfs()) ASSERTION( dev ) failed: LBUG, Pid: 3372, comm: lctl *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10653 LU-10653]: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.114-92.64] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10655 LU-10655]: llmout.sh and llmountcleanup.sh generates meaningless output: ssh exited with exit code 1 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10656 LU-10656]: the reference of obd_export was leaked in ptlrpc_connect_interpret *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10663 LU-10663]: obdfilter-survey *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10682 LU-10682]: o2iblnd txs can be dropped silently *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10703 LU-10703]: All mds Nodemap filset will be cleared when do some nodemap operations (lustre 2.10.3) *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10707 LU-10707]: TCP eth routed LNet traffic broken *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10731 LU-10731]: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.114-94.14] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10735 LU-10735]: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.114-92.67] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10759 LU-10759]: sanity test 27F fails with 'wrong stripecount' when run with a single OST *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10761 LU-10761]: NOT create REMOTE_PARENT_DIR on OST *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10764 LU-10764]: Incorrect code in ct_archive *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10769 LU-10769]: osd-zfs deadlock on osd_object::oo_guard *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10773 LU-10773]: soft lockup when remove changelog *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10783 LU-10783]: kernel update [RHEL7.4 3.10.0-693.21.1.el7] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10794 LU-10794]: lfs quota did not work well for grace time output *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10795 LU-10795]: wrong skipping of reintegration *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10802 LU-10802]: mismatch problem for wildcard in jobid TBF *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10803 LU-10803]: req_buffers_max and req_history_max setting problems *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10813 LU-10813]: kernel update [RHEL6.9 2.6.32-696.23.1.el6] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10837 LU-10837]: no bitmap check if block bitmap is uninitialized *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10845 LU-10845]: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.120-94.17] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10847 LU-10847]: kernel update [SLES12 SP2 4.4.120-92.70] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10859 LU-10859]: Deadlock with heavy memory pressure *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10887 LU-10887]: 2 MDTs stuck in WAITING *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10897 LU-10897]: kernel upgrade [RHEL7.5 3.10.0-862.2.3.el7] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10912 LU-10912]: avoid triggering LU-9856 for older servers *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10944 LU-10944]: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.126-94.22] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-11008 LU-11008]: kernel update [RHEL6.9 2.6.32-696.28.1.el6] *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-11024 LU-11024]: Broken inode accounting of MDT on ZFS *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-11026 LU-11026]: lustre-dkms should require patch or quilt ''' Task ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9761 LU-9761]: Add ldiskfs support to dkms for patchless kernel *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10377 LU-10377]: Update ZFS Version to 0.7.6 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10460 LU-10460]: Evaluate two LLNL patches for upstream *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10569 LU-10569]: Include proper Lustre header files in lustre-dev_*.deb *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10901 LU-10901]: Update ZFS Version to 0.7.8 *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-11019 LU-11019]: Update ZFS Version to 0.7.9 ''' Technical task ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-10248 LU-10248]: Need to update PFID of OST objects after layout change ''' Question/Request ''' *[https://jira.hpdd.intel.com/browse/LU-9594 LU-9594]: sanity test cases 42a-d 45 68 76 407 65ic remove from ALWAYS_EXCEPT [[Category:Releases]]
